original: A brand new weapon fresh from Kihacorp’s range - and a firefighters’ favorite. With a single press on the detonator, they can snuff the heat out of any flames or power source in a heartbeat. They come in smooth, chromed spheres for ergonomic use and with a wireless safety pin to ensure its user isn’t in the radius of the ice blast.
